use_cases: Toggle boolean settings in app preferences or user profiles
Enable/disable features like dark mode, notifications, or auto-save
Control binary states in forms such as accepting terms or subscribing to updates
Use as a styled checkbox alternative in modern UI designs
Interactive demo component for showcasing Framer Motion animation capabilities
ai_summary: A Framer Motion-powered toggle switch component with smooth animated transitions and inset shadow styling. The switch animates its position and slightly morphs its shape between states, featuring a cyan active state against a slate background. Part of the Aceternity UI component library, designed for modern SaaS and dev-tool interfaces.
